page.title: Domain
page.description: Configure a domain for your user pool's hosted login page.
page.noDomainDescription: Configure a domain to enable hosted UI / managed login for this user pool.

create.title: Add domain
create.prefixDescription: Use an Amazon Cognito prefix domain
create.prefixHelp: Enter a domain prefix. The full URL will be shown below.
create.customDomainHelp: Enter the fully-qualified domain name (e.g. auth.example.com)
create.certificateArnHelp: The ARN of an ACM certificate in us-east-1

delete.title: Delete domain
delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the domain {{domain}}? This action cannot be undone.

validation.prefixFormat: Domain prefix can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
validation.customDomainFormat: Enter a valid fully-qualified domain name
validation.certificateArnFormat: Enter a valid ACM certificate ARN (arn:aws:acm:us-east-1:...)
